briefdescription.para: I2C Mux Address.
I2C Clk Address.
Video pattern.
Demo mode 0-colorbar 1-pass through.
This function setup SI5324 clock generator over IIC.
This function setup SI5324 clock generator either in free or locked mode.

parameterdescription.para: specifies an input frequency for the si5324.
specifies the output frequency of si5324.

simplesect.para: Zero if error in programming external clock ele '1' if success

parameterdescription.para: specifies an index for selecting mode frequency.
specifies either free or locked mode.

listitem.para: Zero if error in programming external clock.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *VphyPtr, XV_HdmiTxSs *HdmiTxSsPtr, XVidC_VideoMode VideoMode, XVidC_ColorFormat ColorFormat, XVidC_ColorDepth Bpc)
memberdef.name: EnableColorBar

briefdescription.para: This function enables the ColorBar.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VPHY core instance.
is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is the resolution that is to be displayed
that can be RGB888 or YUV422 or YUV420
is the Bits per color that can be 8 or 10 or 12

briefdescription.para: This function initializes GPIO IP for Stream Switch selection and gets config parameters.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful or else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: This function outputs the video timing , Audio, Link Status, HDMI RX state of HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

None.
None. In addition, it also prints information about HDMI TX, and HDMI GT cores.

briefdescription.para: This function clones the EDID of the connected sink device to the HDMI RX.
This function generates video pattern.

parameterdescription.para: TPG Instance Pointer.

briefdescription.para: This function resets TPG IP.
This function enables MIPI DSI SS.
This function programs GPIO to 1 to select MIPI DSI SS Stream Path in AXI- Stream switch.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function programs GPIO to 1 to select MIPI DSI SS Stream Path in AXI- Stream switch.

briefdescription.para: This function programs GPIO to '0' to select HDMI Stream path in AXI-Stream switch.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None. This function programs GPIO to '0' to select HDMI Stream path in AXI-Stream switch.

briefdescription.para: Main function to initialize the video pipeline and process user input.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if MIPI example was successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This function reports the stream mode.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiTxSs instance.
is a flag to represent passthrough or colorbar mode.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a TX connect event has occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback function reference.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the GT TX reference input clock has changed.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback function reference.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the GT TX has been initialized.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback function reference.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a TX vsync has occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback function reference.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the TX stream is up.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback function reference.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when the TX stream is down.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback function reference.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to start the TX stream after the RX stream was up and running.
This function asserts a callback error.

parameterdescription.para: is current file name.
is line number of the asserted callback.

briefdescription.para: This function resets IMX274 camera sensor.
This function resets image processing pipe.
Main function to initialize the video pipeline and process user input.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if MIPI example was successful else XST_FAILURE

briefdescription.para: This file demonstrates the Xilinx MIPI CSI2 Rx Subsystem and MIPI DSI2 Tx Subsystem.

detaileddescription.para: The video pipeline is created by connecting an IMX274 Camera sensor to the MIPI CSI2 Rx Subsystem. The sensor is programmed to generate RAW10 type de bayered data as per the pipeline configuration. The raw pixels are fed to Xilinx Demosaic, Gamma lut and v_proc_ss IPs to convert pixel to RGB format. The RGB pixels are then sent across to a data Video Test Pattern Generator. In a pass through mode, the camera data is passed to an AXI Stream broadcaster. This sends across video stream to along HDMI Tx Subsystem and a Video Processing Subsystem configured as Scalar. The output of the scalar is connected to the DSI2 Tx Subsystem. The DSI2 output is connected to AUO Asus Display panel with 1920x1200 fixed resolution

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 pg 12/07/17 Initial release.
